title: 読書少女と賢者の催し物

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while returning a book to the library...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
...And what... um... what should we do about this
year's Reading Week event?

text_block_list.name: Library Assistant A
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. I think we'll be fine just displaying some
extra issues of the library newspaper like we do
every year.

text_block_list.name: Library Assistant B
text_block_list.text:
I know how you feel, Zenno, but hardly anyone's
ever interested...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
B-b-but I really think this could be a great
opportunity for people to connect with books...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I couldn't convince them.
choice_data_list: Reading Week prep sure sounds tough...
Reading Week prep sure sounds tough...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Hm? Ah, um...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
From what she tells me, it sounds like the library
staff aren't very enthused about the Reading
Week promotional event.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Students tend to avoid reading because they
think it's difficult, and the library staff feel like
it's pointless to make an effort.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But if people give up on reading without giving it
a try, they're really going to miss out... The
thought of it makes me sad.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Fairy tales, adventures, epic sagas... Books can
whisk you away to all kinds of worlds...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You can become a pretty princess or a brave
hero. A book is like a portal to a world of dreams!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Some books are challenging, but... there are so many wonderful and exciting ones out there too. I'm sure if people just knew that...
choice_data_list: Why don't you use the event to teach them?
Why don't you use the event to teach them?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Yes! If we can use this event to show how
fascinating and charming books can be, people
will feel less intimidated!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Say no more!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You're welcome in advance! ♪ Genius Magical
Girl Sweepy is here to help!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
If we team up and introduce everyone to some
magical tales, I bet we can open their eyes to the
wonders of magic!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: R-really? Then, I'd love your help!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Very well, it's a deal! And if this succeeds, I'll be
expecting you to join me for some magic
practice! ♪

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Okay! If it means more people learn to appreciate
reading, then I'll join you for any kind of practice
you like!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Besides... I've been wanting to express my
gratitude for all your help at the library too.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I only help because you're so clumsy I can't bear to just stand back and watch! I have to step in!
choice_data_list: I'll help out any way I can too!
I'll help out any way I can too!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, both of you!
